name: Athasian Halfling
description: Humanoid. Small. Athasian halflings are fierce, nimble, and difficult to pin down. Fierce: you have advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Frightened condition. Halfling Nimbleness: you can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, but you can't stop there. Luck: when you roll a 1 on the d20 of a d20 Test, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. Naturally Stealthy: you can take the Hide action even when obscured only by a creature at least one size larger than you.
